updates.note: The West Bengal Directorate of Madrasa Education issued a formal administrative order making the singing of 'Vande Mataram' compulsory during assembly prayers prior to the commencement of classes in all government-aided, recognized, and model madrasas across the state with immediate effect.

The School Education Department of West Bengal issued a formal order (No. 607-SED) making the singing of 'Vande Mataram' mandatory during assembly prayers in all schools across the state. The order takes immediate effect and supersedes all previous practices, aimed at promoting national heritage and values in educational institutions.
